FCM.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging — push notifications for iOS and Android
FCM.delivery: Asynchronous push; device must be registered with FCM token

SSE.description: Server-Sent Events — real-time web notifications over HTTP
SSE.delivery: Long-lived HTTP connection; events pushed from server to browser

WEBHOOK.description: HTTP POST to a server-side callback URL
WEBHOOK.delivery: Synchronous HTTP POST; receiving server must return 2xx

EMAIL.delivery: Asynchronous; no delivery guarantee beyond SMTP acceptance

SMS.use_case: Fallback for mobile; OTP codes; critical alerts
